name: 06_condition_met_count_two_to_three_hit
description: Condition met, count=2 -> 3. Threshold crossed; hit=True (3 >= 3).
derivation: Guard passes. Magnitude: -1.5 <= -1.0 - 0.10 = -1.10 is TRUE. MC: 50.0 < 60.0 is TRUE. Condition met. new_count = 2 + 1 = 3. Hit = (3 >= EXIT_CONFIRM_TICKS(3)) is True. This is the threshold crossing -- the load-bearing exit transition.
